login.title: Log in to your account
login.subtitle: Sign up today and unlock exclusive perks on your first order!
login.socialLabel: Sign in with your social accounts

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: Enter your user account's verified email address and we will send you a password reset link.
forgot.checkEmailDescription: Check your email for the password reset link. If it doesn't arrive in a few minutes, be sure to check your spam folder.
forgot.requestFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now.

validation.credentialsMismatch: Email address & password does not match
